title: Chai's Early Game Overhaul
description: A vanilla-friendly overhaul to the early game progression
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/F0oelsh.png)

## About

A vanilla-friendly overhaul to the early game progression that makes getting stone tools take longer than 30 seconds. Instead of punching trees, you need to explore and gather a few resources such as sticks and flint to craft an axe, coal samples to make a campfire, baking clay into bricks on a campfire to build a furnace, and raw copper samples to craft your first pickaxe. When you first spawn in, you'll be given the Survival Manual, which you can read below.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GOKjle9i/images/706fa74fe3bfb654ed96da2bb77778022a0bd081.png)

## Post Mortem

Once you've crafted your set of copper tools, you are now at the same position as having stone tools in vanilla Minecraft.

## Supported Languages

- Brazilian Portuguese (Kett)
- Chilean Spanish (Mudkip)
- English
- Polish (Eggmanplant)
  - Guide book missing
- Romanian (David050707)
